channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: President Trump shares a new reason why the U.S. attacked Iran - NPR
item.description:
1. President Trump shares a new reason why the U.S. attacked Iran  NPR
  2. DoW Identifies Army Casualties  U.S. Department of War (.gov)
  3. Pentagon identifies four soldiers killed in March 1 drone strike during Kuwait military operation  Fox News
  4. Iran updates: Americans killed by retaliatory strike identified, Trump administration pledges to 'unleash' more attacks  Yahoo
  5. No warning, no siren: Six US service members killed in Iranian strike that hit makeshift operations center in Kuwait  CNN

item.description:
1. CIA station in Saudi capital hit in drone attack  The Washington Post

item.title: Greece deploys warships, jets to Cyprus after drone strikes on UK air base Akrotiri - Defense News

item.title: Hacked traffic cameras and US intelligence: How a plot to kill Iran’s supreme leader came together - CNN

item.title: Pakistan says its forces killed 67 Afghan troops in cross-border clashes. Kabul rejects the claim - AP News

item.title: Iran strikes aren’t an ‘endless’ war, Pentagon policy chief argues - Politico
item.description:
1. Iran strikes aren’t an ‘endless’ war, Pentagon policy chief argues  Politico
  2. Pentagon Defends Security Strategy After Iran Attacks  Bloomberg
  3. ‘Strong and clear, but quiet’: Pentagon policy head faces Senate questions over NDS  Breaking Defense
  4. Key GOP senator criticizes Pentagon strategy in Colby hearing  The Hill
  5. Colby Defends New National Defense Strategy’s ‘Flexible Realism’ in Senate Hearing  USNI News
